title: MirrorTrace Breach Exposure Check Input
description: Checks the SELF subject's OWN credential hygiene against public breach corpora using k-anonymity. Secrets never leave the machine in full. Prohibited scopes are absent from the enum; only self/public_figure are accepted because credential enumeration is a dual-use technique restricted to those scopes.

scope_type.title: Scope type
scope_type.description: Dual-use credential checks are permitted ONLY for your own footprint (self) or a genuine public figure acting publicly. Other compliant scopes (consented/brand/safety_evidence) intentionally cannot run this actor.

subject_label.title: Subject label
subject_label.description: Human label for the subject (e.g. your name). Used only for reporting.

self_emails.title: Your own email addresses
self_emails.description: Email addresses you OWN (or a public figure's publicly-listed contact). Each is hashed locally; only a 5-char SHA-1 prefix is sent. The full address is never transmitted or stored.

candidate_passwords.title: Candidate passwords to test (yours only)
candidate_passwords.description: Passwords YOU use, to test against the Pwned Passwords corpus via k-anonymity. Only the first 5 chars of each SHA-1 hash leave the machine; the password is never transmitted, logged, or stored. Do not enter anyone else's passwords.

enable_account_breach_lookup.title: Authenticated own-account breach lookup
enable_account_breach_lookup.description: If true AND scope_type=self AND the HIBP_API_KEY env var is set, query the authenticated HIBP breachedaccount API for YOUR OWN emails. Without a key this is skipped (never faked).
